characters.name: Alex Kerkovich
characters.description: Alex KerkovichBiographyGenderFemaleStatusin a relationship withDave RoseFamilyJane Williams(sister)Brooke Kerkovich(sister)RomancesDave Rose(ex-fiancé / boyfriend)OccupationWomen's clothes storeTastemaker(former)Series InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byElisha CuthbertAlex Kerkovichis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. She is the younger sister ofJane Williams, and has an on-and-off relationship with her close childhood friendDave Rose. She is portrayed byElisha Cuthbert. Alex is a ditzy blonde girl, raised in the city of Chicago. On the day of her wedding, she leaves her fiancé and childhood friend,Dave Rose, at the alter and runs away. Leaving everyone to believe that she ran away with her co-workerBo Bazinski. Everyone at the wedding was left stunned, and Dave crushed. Alex uses her honeymoon to reflect and returns to her and Dave's apartment, begging forgiveness for hurting him, but explaining that she was having second thoughts about their stagnating relationship for years. Though she does not wish to get back together with Dave, she genuinely feels bad for hurting him, and the two eventually reconcile. Alex gets especially concerned about how her actions affected their mutual circle of close friends. Alex owns her own boutique women's clothing store named "Xela" (her name spelled backward and pronounced "Shayla") in the heart of Chicago, which does not do very well and is rarely busy. She frequently spends time with Dave, her older sister,Jane, brother-in-law,Brad Williams, friendMax Blum, and childhood friend,Penny Hartzat the group's favorite bar and hang out spot,Rosalita's.

characters.name: Bo Bazinski
characters.description: Bo BazinskiBo Bazinskiis a minor character in thefirstseason of theABCcomedy seriesHappy Endings. He is portrayed byTravis Van Winkle.

characters.name: Brad Williams
characters.description: Brad WilliamsBiographyBirthdateApril 20, 1983GenderMaleStatusMarried toJane WilliamsFamilyFrancis Williams(father)Alex Kerkovich(sister-in-law)RomancesJane Williams(wife)OccupationInvestment FirmSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byDamon Wayans Jr.Bradford "Brad" Williamsis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. He is married toJane Williams. He is portrayed byDamon Wayans Jr. Brad works for a huge Chicago investment firm and was introduced to his wife,Jane, by his best budMaxon their season of Real World Sacramento. Brad andJaneare a happily married Type-A couple. An ideal night for Brad is hanging out at home, watching TV, eating Chinese food and having unprotected sex with his smoking hot wife. Brad is always down to watch a game, hit a bar, or play videogames for hours on end. Brad andJaneare a happily married Type-A couple. An ideal night for Brad is hanging out at home, watching TV, eating Chinese food and having unprotected sex with his smoking hot wife. Brad is always down to watch a game, hit a bar, or play videogames for hours on end.

characters.description: Brooke KerkovichBiographyFull NameBrooke KerkovichAliasesBrookeGenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyJane Williams(sister)Alex Kerkovich(sister)Series InformationSeasons3Portrayed byStephanie MarchBrooke Kerkovichis a guest character in theABCcomedy seriesHappy Endings. characters.name: Dana Hartz
characters.description: Dana HartzBiographyFull NameDana HartzAliasesDana(by everyone)Mom(by Penny)GenderFemaleStatusAliveFamilyPenny Hartz(daughter)Series InformationSeasons2&3Episodes3Portrayed byMegan MullallyDana Hartzis a recurring character in thesecondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. She is the mother ofPenny Hartz, and they have a very complicated relationship.

characters.name: Dave Rose
characters.description: Dave RoseBiographyBirthdateAugust 16 or August 18GenderMaleRomancesAlex Kerkovich(Ex-fiancé / girlfriend)OccupationIndependent Sandwich Truck OwnerSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byZachary KnightonDave Roseis a fictional character from theABCsitcomHappy Endings. He is portrayedZachary Knighton. After being left at the altar on his wedding day by Alex, Dave found himself picking up the pieces of a broken relationship and getting back into the dating world. With the help of his best friends Brad Williams and Max Blum,  Dave quit his day job and is now self-employed; operating a steak sandwich food truck called 'Steak Me Home Tonight'. Dave is currently sharing residence with stains of unknown origin on Max's futon as he figures out how to get his life back on track. Since his breakup with Alex, Dave has dated or had relations with several women, which occasionally annoys Alex since she hasn't had much luck with her own dating life.

characters.name: David Rose
characters.description: Big Dave RoseDavid "Big Dave" Roseis a minor character in theABCcomedy seriesHappy Endings. He is portrayed byMichael McKean.

characters.name: Jane Williams
characters.description: Jane WilliamsBiographyFull NameJane Kerkovich-WilliamsGenderFemaleStatusMarried toBrad WilliamsFamilyAlex Kerkovich(sister)RomancesBrad Williams(husband)OccupationWorks for The Car CzarSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byEliza CoupeJane Kerkovich-Williamsis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. She is married toBrad Williamsand is the older sister ofAlex Kerkovich. She is portrayed byEliza Coupe. Jane isAlex's sister and often the voice of reason for her. Her competitive nature and leader-of-the-pack mentality always have her in charge of everything, including her husband, Brad, who is working on conceiving their first child. She is a very competitive person, this can be seen in episodesDave of the DeadandOf Mice & Jazz-Kwon-Do, where she challengesMaxandPenny. Jane is a beautiful woman with pale white skin and frosted spruce eyes. She has straight, dirty blonde hair that she keeps shoulder length with a side part. She dresses professionally, with button up shirts and skirts, often paired with pumps. She uses minimal makeup and paints her nails with the ring finger always a different color.

characters.description: Lon SaroskyBiographyFull NameLon SaroskyAliasesThe Car CzarGenderMaleStatusAliveSeries InformationSeasons3Episodes3Portrayed byRob CorddryLon Sarosky, known as"The Car Czar", is a minor character in thethirdseason of theABCcomedy seriesHappy Endings. He is portrayed byRob Corddry.

characters.name: Max Blum
characters.description: Max BlumBiographyGenderMaleSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byAdam PallyMax Blumis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. He is portrayed byAdam Pally. Max shares his downtown loft with Dave, his close friend. He is very close withPenny Hartz, and they have a tumultuous "gay best friend" relationship. Max is always trying to figure it out, taking one day at a time. If there is too much planning for his future involved, it's not being done by Max.You know that friend who is always down for a bet no matter how big or how small it is? The friend that can make a sandwich out of anything? The friend you can always rely on to watch a game or have a beer with? That is Max's ideal man. Max is gay, and comes out to his parents in the first season. Max is always trying to figure it out, taking one day at a time. If there is too much planning for his future involved, it's not being done by Max.You know that friend who is always down for a bet no matter how big or how small it is? The friend that can make a sandwich out of anything? The friend you can always rely on to watch a game or have a beer with? That is Max's ideal man. Max is gay, and comes out to his parents in the first season. He is lazy, immature, and has no intention of committing to a relationship. Max does not conform to typical gay stereotypes, being more into typically masculine things like sports, guns, and video games. Penny once described him as "a straight guy who likes dudes." It revealed very early on that Max has a problem when people make fun of his weight or call him chubby. In the Pilot episode when Dave called him chubby he worried about it the entire episode. He also occasionally beats himself up for it in the "Quicksand Girlfriend" Penny seemingly mocks Derrick by asking how many eggwhite fritatas can a person eat and Max says to himself "six in one sitting" also in the Season 2 episode Secrets and Limos it's revealed that he still isn't okay with his weight when Dave's new girlfriend as he puts it "jellies his belly".

characters.name: Penny Hartz
characters.description: Penny HartzBiographyBirthdateMarch 22, 1981GenderFemaleFamilyDana Hartz(mother)RomancesPete(ex-fiancé)Todd(ex-boyfriend)Series InformationSeasons1•2•3Episodes57(+1 special)First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.23:"Brothas & Sisters"Portrayed byCasey WilsonPenny Hartzis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCsitcomHappy Endings. She is portrayed byCasey Wilson. Penny is the social glue of the friend group. Always quick to offer advice to either Alex or Dave about the ups and downs of dating as she is well-versed in the single dating culture of the new decade. She works for a public relations firm and prides herself on being the most stylish person in the office. Penny and Max have been best friends since college and provide each other a shoulder to lean on. She's often is a mess but stays supportive and loyal when the group needs her. Penny is a beautiful woman with white skin and green eyes. She has wavy, dark brown hair which she keeps past her shoulders and often straightened. She dresses casually with form-fitting or flowy dresses. She wears natural makeup and often dangly earrings or bracelets.
